name: 8 Ball Kings
short_description: 8 Ball Kings delivers a realistic and immersive billiards experience! Master precise shots, compete in single-player mode, or challenge friends in local multiplayer. Customize your cues and tables, enjoy smooth controls, and become the ultimate 8-ball champion. Are you ready to break?
detailed_description:
Take your shot, master the table.
8 Ball Kings brings the authentic feel of pool halls to your PC—smooth physics, realistic gameplay, and strategic decision-making. Whether you’re lining up a safe break or aiming for the winning cue ball combo, every move matters.

Features

  • Realistic billiards physics and smooth control for a true pool experience Steam Store

  • Single-player mode to sharpen your skills against AI Steam Store

  • Local multiplayer so you can challenge a friend in head-to-head matches Steam Store

  • Customizable tables and cues — make your setup your own Steam Store

  • Immersive graphics and sound to evoke the ambiance of a real pool hall Steam Store

  • Casual enough for newcomers, deep enough for enthusiasts Steam Store

About This Game

Step into 8 Ball Kings and feel like you’re right at the table. The physics engine has been finely tuned so that every collision, spin, and angle feels natural—no weird glitches, just real pool behavior. The controls respond cleanly, letting you aim, spin, and shoot with precision.

Single-player mode is your proving ground. Use it to hone your skills, practice tricky shots, and understand how angles and force interplay. Once you're confident, bring a friend into local multiplayer and see who truly rules the table.

Customization is more than cosmetic. Change your cue, tweak its look, and pick a table that suits your style. Every match becomes part of your narrative as a player with identity and strategy.

Visually, 8 Ball Kings leans into a rich, detailed presentation. Tables gleam, cues cast reflections, and ambient lighting enhances immersion. Sound design complements the visuals—balls click, the table cloth whispers, and background murmurs evoke the hush of an attentive hall.

Matches play out at your pace. There's no frantic timer forcing rushed shots—just steady focus, measured planning, and satisfying results. Missed shots teach you, repeated shots sharpen you, and successful runs reward you.

Become the 8 Ball King not by luck alone, but by consistent skill, clever plays, and a deep feel for the game.
